Contact

I’m Jack, the person behind Things Happening. This is a one-person project. There is no team, no contact form, and no public-facing chatbot. If you have something genuine to say, email me directly at

jack@thingshappening.com

I check messages occasionally and only reply when it’s relevant to this site’s purpose.

What I’m open to

  • Collaborations — Guest posts, cross-promotion, or working together on content about things to do in and around Chattanooga.
  • Corrections & feedback — Spotted a factual error, broken link, or have a genuine suggestion to improve a guide or editorial? Let me know.
  • Questions — Genuine questions about events, places, or anything covered on this site.

What I won’t reply to

  • Marketing pitches, link exchange requests, or “partnership” spam
  • Requests for 1-on-1 travel planning or personalized itineraries
  • Promotional content that doesn’t fit this site’s focus on local, in-depth guides and editorials
